(1 comment)

Sorry I've changed my mind on this, but it isn't very robust and will break if there is any other kind of layout, or random corruption.  

Of course it would also be better to properly handle the composite layouts, but the "don't dump unknown layouts" (maybe print magic only)check should remain.

parents.subject: LU-10190 osd-zfs: create agent object for remote object

commit.subject: LU-9774 mdt: mdt_dump_lmm(), don't panic
commit.message:
LU-9774 mdt: mdt_dump_lmm(), don't panic

skip compond layouts as mdt_dump_lmm() doesn't understand that yet.

Change-Id: I48d447f81d58466f473de871bc59d011d8b6f7ba
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <alexey.zhuravlev@intel.com>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/29188
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <uja.ornl@yahoo.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
